_note: Live run on 2026-04-22T19:08Z. Script crashed at S3 PUT (step 1/6) due to bucket resource policy AccessDenied for IAM user kevin. blockers: S3 bucket kosdata-blobsf0f01dc6-etsqrpvycg0c resource policy denies s3:PutObject to IAM user 'kevin' (operator) — by design, since the bucket is locked down to the telegram-bot Lambda's role only. Workaround for the gate: use the Telegram bot path (real Kevin voice memo), or temporarily relax the bucket policy. NOT a bug — just a friction the e2e script doesn't anticipate.

EVEN IF S3 PUT had succeeded, the pipeline would have failed: every Phase 2 runtime Lambda crashes at INIT with 'Dynamic require of <X> is not supported' — see Gate 2 evidence file §1.b for the universal esbuild ESM bundling bug.
